records.m_Talk_ENG: Having decided that, you called her to your office. She said she'd be here soon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph, who do you think you are? Shouldn't you be coming to see me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph, who do you think you are? Shouldn't you be coming to see me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph, who do you think you are? Shouldn't you be coming to see me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll let it slide because it's you. So? Why did you want to see me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll let it slide because it's you. So? Why did you want to see me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll let it slide because it's you. So? Why did you want to see me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What?! You got a recommendation letter from the Chairwoman? Give it here!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What?! You got a recommendation letter from the Chairwoman? Give it here!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What?! You got a recommendation letter from the Chairwoman? Give it here!

records.m_Talk_ENG: "She's an excellent student, so give her a chance"...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: "She's an excellent student, so give her a chance"...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: "She's an excellent student, so give her a chance"...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, I never thought she'd write me a recommendation letter. Well, I am used to these kinds of special treatments...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, I never thought she'd write me a recommendation letter. Well, I am used to these kinds of special treatments...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, I never thought she'd write me a recommendation letter. Well, I am used to these kinds of special treatments...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I should refrain from cosplaying while I'm at work?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I should refrain from cosplaying while I'm at work?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I should refrain from cosplaying while I'm at work?

records.m_Talk_ENG: This isn't cosplay! This is my secret weapon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This isn't cosplay! This is my secret weapon.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This isn't cosplay! This is my secret weapon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A-anyway, fine! Let's get this over with already!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A-anyway, fine! Let's get this over with already!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A-anyway, fine! Let's get this over with already!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay, the contract is signed! Now, tell me what my first mission is going to be.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay, the contract is signed! Now, tell me what my first mission is going to be.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay, the contract is signed! Now, tell me what my first mission is going to be.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I have a lot of experience, so I'm sure you'll be giving me a mission to eliminate C.O.s in the Counterside, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I have a lot of experience, so I'm sure you'll be giving me a mission to eliminate C.O.s in the Counterside, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I have a lot of experience, so I'm sure you'll be giving me a mission to eliminate C.O.s in the Counterside, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I'm starting as an intern?! O-organizing paperwork?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I'm starting as an intern?! O-organizing paperwork?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I'm starting as an intern?! O-organizing paperwork?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's ridiculous! This isn't what I signed up for!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's ridiculous! This isn't what I signed up for!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's ridiculous! This isn't what I signed up for!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
I even cosplayed
8g I mean, came here fully geared up, and this is how you treat me?
records.m_Talk_DEU:
I even cosplayed
8g I mean, came here fully geared up, and this is how you treat me?
records.m_Talk_FRA:
I even cosplayed
8g I mean, came here fully geared up, and this is how you treat me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even heroes started with small tasks?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even heroes started with small tasks?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even heroes started with small tasks?

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you won't be able to look at Ms. Chairwoman in the face if you deploy me into a dangerous mission from the get-go...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you won't be able to look at Ms. Chairwoman in the face if you deploy me into a dangerous mission from the get-go...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you won't be able to look at Ms. Chairwoman in the face if you deploy me into a dangerous mission from the get-go...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmph! Sounds fair enough. So, I just need to organize these documents, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmph! Sounds fair enough. So, I just need to organize these documents, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmph! Sounds fair enough. So, I just need to organize these documents, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Okay. I'll finish it all up within an hour, as an elite should!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Okay. I'll finish it all up within an hour, as an elite should!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Okay. I'll finish it all up within an hour, as an elite should!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Also, you have to promise to give me more work after I'm done with this, okay?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also, you have to promise to give me more work after I'm done with this, okay?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Also, you have to promise to give me more work after I'm done with this, okay?!
